message:
test(vcr): add proptest-based fuzz coverage for VCR cassette parser

- Add proptest_vcr module (~257 lines) with comprehensive property-based
  tests for VCR cassette parsing (FUZZ-P1.7)
- Define strategies for generating arbitrary HTTP requests/responses:
  small_string(), url_string(), http_method(), header_pair() with
  realistic distributions including edge cases (empty strings, CRLF
  injection attempts, unicode)
- Exercises cassette serialization → deserialization round-trips with
  fuzzed payloads to catch parser edge cases in JSON/JSONL formats
- Tests cassette matching logic with arbitrary request parameters to
  verify deterministic replay behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
